title: John Pavetto
compiled_truth: John Pavetto is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-11 to 2001-11-15), John Pavetto sent 7 and received 105 emails, totalling 112 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (4), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (1).
